# Ras Tanura

**Summary**: A coastal city and port in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] sampled particulate matter from Ras Tanura to analyze local pollution levels.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] investigated site conditions at Eco Park, Ras Tanura.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] Coastal area with refinery operations

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] investigated site conditions at Eco Park, Ras Tanura.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- Samples from Ras Tanura were analyzed for mineralogy and trace metal content. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 130]])

- Showed moderate ecological conditions since 1827. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 15]])
